creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
1. Fresh AUTO-ZFS install from latest CURRENT ISO (FreeBSD-13.0-CURRENT-amd64-20210107-f2b794e1e90-255641-disc1.iso): 'bectl activate -t' works.

2. Fresh AUTO-ZFS install from latest STABLE ISO (FreeBSD-12.2-STABLE-amd64-20201231-r368787-disc1.iso): 'bectl activate -t' works. 

3. After upgrading STABLE VM (from 2.) to HEAD (main-c255827-gdcdad299479e) 'bectl activate -t' no longer works:

# bectl list
BE      Active Mountpoint Space Created
default NR     /          775M  2021-01-10 12:47
# bectl create test
# bectl activate -t test
Successfully activated boot environment test
for next boot
# bectl list
BE      Active Mountpoint Space Created
default NR     /          775M  2021-01-10 12:47
test    T      -          8K    2021-01-10 14:10
# shutdown -r now
# bectl list
BE      Active Mountpoint Space Created
default NR     /          775M  2021-01-10 12:47
test    -      -          308K  2021-01-10 14:10

'bectl activate' works:

# bectl activate test
Successfully activated boot environment test
# bectl list
BE      Active Mountpoint Space Created
default N      /          308K  2021-01-10 12:47
test    R      -          775M  2021-01-10 14:10
# shutdown -r now
# bectl list
BE      Active Mountpoint Space Created
default -      -          588K  2021-01-10 12:47
test    NR     /          775M  2021-01-10 14:10
